name: ticketsPorContrato
code: SELECT CASE WHEN T.SLA_ACORDO LIKE '%24%7%' THEN 'SLA 24x7' WHEN T.SLA_ACORDO LIKE '%12%5%' THEN 'SLA 12x5' WHEN T.SLA_ACORDO LIKE '%8%5%' AND T.SLA_ACORDO NOT LIKE '%sem SLA%' THEN 'SLA 8x5' ELSE 'Sem SLA de resolucao' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM TICKETS T WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(T.CRIADO_EM, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}') AND ('{{status}}' = '' OR T.STATUS = '{{status}}') AND ('{{categoria}}' = '' OR T.CATEGORIA = '{{categoria}}') AND ('{{analista}}' = '' OR T.OWNER_NOME = '{{analista}}') AND ('{{urgencia}}' = '' OR T.URGENCIA = '{{urgencia}}') AND ('{{equipe}}' = '' OR T.EQUIPE = '{{equipe}}') AND ('{{origem}}' = '' OR T.ORIGEM_NOME = '{{origem}}') AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR T.CRIADO_EM >= '{{dataInicio}}') AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR T.CRIADO_EM <= '{{dataFim}}') GROUP BY name ORDER BY value DESC
